case_title: **TRANSFERRED TO SANTA CLARA COUNTY** LISSETTE GUTIERREZ HERNANDEZ VS. DALTON WAYNE TERRY ET AL

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GUTIERREZ HERNANDEZ, LISSETTE AN INDIVIDUAL AS TO DEFENDANT TERRY, DALTON WAYNE AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 TO 50 INCLUSIVE NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JAN-13-2021 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-09-2020 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         DEC-21-2020
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100119689) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GUTIERREZ HERNANDEZ, LISSETTE AN INDIVIDUAL JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 5.0 DAYS
MINI MINUTES FOR FEB-22-2021 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE FEB-22-2021 HEARING RE: DEFENDANT DALTON TERRY'S MOTION TO TRANSFER, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. MOTION GRANTED. PURSUANT TO THE PARTIES' STIPULATION, THE COURT TRANSFERS THIS ACTION TO SANTA CLARA COUNTY AND DEFENDANT TERRY IS TO REMIT THE TRANSFER FEES. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED (302/EPS)

MOTION TO TRANSFER
Off Calendar Feb-22-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT DALTON TERRY'S MOTION TO TRANSFER.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Motion granted. Pursuant to the parties' stipulation, the Court transfers this action to Santa Clara County and defendant Terry is to remit the transfer fees.

Order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/EPS)
